subject: Language Arts
sample_standards: Your child uses the right kind of language when talking in both casual and formal situations.
Your child asks and answers questions about a story using details from the text.
Your child retells stories from different cultures and explains the main message or lesson using details from the story.
Your child uses spelling patterns, word meanings, and how words relate to each other to read new words and learn new vocabulary.
With help, your child can figure out which word is missing from a sentence that is read aloud.
Your child reads grade-level text with a clear purpose and understands what they read.
Your child works well with others in group activities.
Your child can use pictures and words from the text to answer who and what questions.
canonical_name: Grade 3 Language Arts: Reading Comprehension — Story Details and Vocabulary
coherence_reason: The standards cluster around reading comprehension, vocabulary, and story details, but also mix in speaking/listening and collaboration, which are distinct sub-concepts.

subject: Language Arts
sample_standards: Your child uses tools to identify, describe, and draw special four-sided shapes and sorts flat shapes based on their features.
Your child can observe and describe shapes by their important features, sort and draw them, and begin learning about fractions by dividing shapes.
Your child uses tools to explore the features of triangles and circles.
Your child learns about shapes by looking at their parts and how they fit together, and practices dividing shapes to understand fractions.
Your child can put together flat or solid shapes to make bigger shapes and then create new shapes from those.
Your child can plot points on the first quadrant of a coordinate plane and explain what the points mean in real situations.
Your child can find and draw lines of symmetry on flat shapes by folding them to see if the parts match.
Your child can use formulas to find the volume of prisms and describe 3D shapes like prisms and cylinders.
canonical_name: Grade 3 Math: Geometry — Properties and Composition of Shapes
coherence_reason: The standards are related to geometry but include three distinct areas: properties and classification of shapes, composition/decomposition of shapes, and unrelated concepts like coordinate plane, symmetry, and volume.
